description: The Notes module: folders, favorites, tree, block editor, creating/editing note content, or using note tools.
detection_hint: note, notes module, folder, favorite, star, sidebar, tree, breadcrumb, block editor, create note, edit note, append, read note, list notes

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Notes: local documents; folders and tree; favorite = star near title. Block editor: headings, lists, quotes, code, "/" for block menu; markdown shortcuts (e.g. "## " + space → H2). Tools: list_notes, read_note, create_note, update_note, append_to_note, open_note. Rule: if a suitable note already exists (by title or context), use update_note or append_to_note—avoid create_note. Prefer tools over only describing text.
